label: G5 V3 wave-A deploy
description: Boost stack wired live (section_boost, pain, source_type, tier, salience). A8 0.6237 nDCG@10 (+9.4% vs G4).

label: G6 reverse — DB swap reveal
description: A8 G6 0.5845 vs G5 V3 0.6237 explained by DB swap (g5.db 68k vs entity-eval 500), not code regression. Triggered eval-DB verification discipline.

label: G10 mutex validated
description: Path B real ablation on g9.db (69495 chunks): A8' Hard Mutex +0.79% nDCG / +2.65% MRR vs no-mutex. Kept deployed.

label: G11 trim rejected
description: Entity 2.0→1.3, lesson 1.8→1.2 produced Δ -0.73% nDCG / -1.58% MRR. Mutex alone canonical. D48 closed.

label: G10b per-category mutex
description: single-hop +8.22% / open-domain +2.42% WIN; multi-hop -3.95% / adversarial -2.95% regression. Net positive — kept deployed.

label: G10c per-style mutex
description: natural-language +1.56% WIN; keyword -0.72% drag. Aggregate consistent with G10/G10b; KW×adversarial -5.35% was the only material outlier.

label: G10d ACTIVE-T2 deployed
description: Threshold=2 wins: multi-hop +1.58% / adversarial +3.04% recovered. T=1 failed (15612 entities). Gated on Toto sign-off.

label: G12 R3 dedup carve-out merged (PR #206)
description: Layer-4 carve-out for entity chunks — entity frontmatter no longer over-dedups when retrieval benefits from twin chunks.
